changelog: CHANGED: Refactored core code to minimize false positives in Windows Defender, reducing safe software warnings caused by the application's process-handling capabilities.
CHANGED: Updated internal software libraries to their latest versions to ensure optimal performance and security.
CHANGED: Implemented minor UI adjustments and visual refinements in several areas of the application to enhance overall interface consistency.
NEW: Integrated a Terms of Service agreement window that appears upon the first launch of the application.
NEW: Introduced a dedicated button in the user interface referencing the new PRO version, which premieres alongside this 1.3.0 release.

NEW: Introduced a dedicated button in the user interface referencing the new PRO version, which premieres alongside this 1.3.0 release.
